item.title: There are now more anti-White and anti-Asian laws in South Africa than anti-Black laws under Aparthe...
item.description:
There are now more anti-White and anti-Asian laws in South Africa than anti-Black laws under Apartheid.
Racism is wrong no matter who it is against.
--- @elonmusk | ❤️ 568 | 🔁 122 | 💬 165 | 👁 33208
item.author: @elonmusk
